posts.title: Welcome to My Journal
posts.body: This space is where I capture thoughtful reflections, quiet daily moments, and the progress of ambitious study goals. Each entry can include images and meaningful files, so the story of my day grows richer over time.

study.subject: English
study.notes: Vocabulary, reading, and creative writing practice are improving steadily. Next goal: finish the contemporary novel and summarize key themes.

study.subject: Biology
study.notes: Memorizing cellular structures and mapping ecosystems. I plan to create a mind map for genetics this week.

study.subject: Chemistry
study.notes: Balancing equations feels more intuitive. I am reviewing organic reaction patterns and lab reports.

study.subject: Physics
study.notes: Today I walked through kinematics and momentum. I am curious about applying these ideas to real world motion.

study.subject: Mathematics
study.notes: Algebra and calculus are blending into a clearer picture. I want to practice problem sets in linear algebra next.

study.subject: Information
study.notes: Concepts of data flow, networks, and information theory are getting stronger. I am building a personal glossary of key terms.

study.subject: Programming
study.notes: FastAPI is powering this journal. I am exploring new automation patterns and building a friendly admin API.

study.subject: Others
study.notes: I reserve this space for new interests, creative experiments, and soft skill growth. Learning is never just one subject.
